Hardware Component File

AJ0_L47_MP_6A-5x_V4

System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference AJ0_L47_MP_6A-5x_V4_20100519T100511.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 10400
Send ID 7E1
Receive ID 7E9
Functional Addr 6E
Functional Name BVA

Array Listing 1 Entries

    "supplier": "APY",
    "soft": "006A",
    "version": "6A50"
